title: ctenopteris pycnophylla
intro: Ctenopteris pycnophylla, also known as the Ceylon Oak Fern, is a species of fern found in Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Ctenopteris pycnophylla include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Ctenopteris pycnophylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
